name: Improper Neutralization of Script in Attributes in a Web Page
description: The product does not neutralize javascript: URIs or event handler attributes (onmouseover, onload, onerror, style) in user-controlled input placed into HTML attributes, allowing script execution when the attribute is processed by the browser.
detection_pattern: INGRESS node provides user input containing javascript: URIs or event handler names that is placed into HTML tag attributes in EGRESS[html_output] without a TRANSFORM[attribute_sanitization] node that strips event handlers and dangerous URI schemes
